expectations.text: correct-filename: Creates pages/Dashboards___Active Tasks.md with triple-underscore namespace
datalog-begin-end: Uses #+BEGIN_QUERY and #+END_QUERY delimiters for advanced query
block-marker-filter: Datalog query filters on :block/marker for NOW and LATER
date-inputs: Query uses :inputs with date-related values (e.g. :7d-before, :today, :14d)
sort-by-priority: Includes result-transform with sort-by on :block/priority
simple-query: Has a {{query ...}} simple inline query
outliner-syntax: All content lines start with '- ' bullet prefix
expectations.evidence: All content lines (1, 3, 4, 5, 24, 25) start with '- ' and use proper 2-space nesting
